# Copilot Instructions

## 项目指南
- All comments in the codebase must be written in English. Avoid Chinese characters in comments to prevent encoding issues.
- Ensure all files are saved and written with UTF-8 encoding to prevent garbled text.
- When using PowerShell to write file content, specify -Encoding UTF8.
- Prefer tools and configurations that preserve UTF-8; the goal is to avoid encoding corruption, not to restrict which tools are used
